title: Entertainment and Recreation Managers, Except Gambling
description: Plan, direct, or coordinate entertainment and recreational activities and operations of a recreational facility, including cruise ships and parks.

tasks.text: Plan, organize, or lead group activities for customers, such as exercise routines, athletic events, or arts and crafts.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Plan programs of events or schedules of activities.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Talk to coworkers using electronic devices, such as computers and radios.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Write budgets to plan recreational activities or programs.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Interview and hire associates to fill staff vacancies.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Calculate and record department expenses and revenue.
tasks.rationale: Routine cognitive or manual task with high vulnerability to automation.

tasks.text: Talk to customers to convey information about events or activities.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Explain rules and regulations of facilities and entertainment attractions to customers.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Administer first aid in emergency situations.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Assign tasks and work hours to staff.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Resolve customer complaints regarding worker performance or services rendered.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Store and retrieve equipment, such as vehicles, radios, and ride components.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Train workers in company procedures or policy.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Write and present strategies for recreational facility programming using customer or employee data.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Inspect equipment, such as rides, games, and vehicles, to detect wear and damage.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Clean equipment and areas of amusement park, cruise ship, or other recreational facility.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Operate, drive, or explain the use of mechanical equipment in amusement parks, cruise ships, or other recreational facilities.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.
